title: Trump links Iran negotiations to expansion of Abraham Accords
full_text:
Trump links Iran negotiations to expansion of Abraham Accords
Trump links Iran negotiations to expansion of Abraham Accords
US President Donald Trump has said that countries including Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Egypt, Turkiye and Pakistan should sign the Abraham Accords and normalise ties with Israel as part of a wider deal to end the war with Iran. Al Jazeera’s Kimberly Halkett explains.
Published On 25 May 2026
